name: Adam Carolla and Friends Build Stuff Live
original_name: Adam Carolla and Friends Build Stuff Live
overview: Acclaimed comedian and master carpenter Adam Carolla builds stuff with some of his big name Hollywood friends. He also tackles home improvement projects via social media, making us laugh the whole way. Since the show is live, anything could happen.

trailers.title: Adam Carolla Visits a Hardware Store | Build Stuff Live
